automated.note: All 30 test files fail with ModuleNotFoundError: No module named 'kuzu' on system Python 3.14. Previous run (project venv): 118/118 pass

evidence: All 8 plans (01-08) completed with SUMMARY artifacts
CONTEXT.json and CONTEXT.md present and up to date
All 21 ContextGraph methods implemented per plan specifications
All 6 workflow functions implemented with graceful degradation
18 CLI subcommands verified in previous review
stageReviews.notes: All planning artifacts complete. Feature fully implemented as specified across 8 plans.

findings.description: f-string interpolation of file_path directly into Cypher query. Potential injection if file path contains single quotes.
add_relationships() docstring claims 'Duplicate rel_ids are silently skipped' but uses CREATE, not MERGE. Duplicates are not prevented.
_build_class_index() hardcodes NodeLabel.CLASS — won't find INTERFACE nodes for EXTENDS/IMPLEMENTS.
ContextGraph.search() uses CONTAINS-based storage.search(). HybridSearch in search.py (BM25+semantic+fuzzy via RRF) is completely unused.
N+1 query: storage.get_node() called per BFS node, then again per result node. Same nodes fetched twice.
N+1 query: _query_node_name() called per member node in each community.
O(n^2) pairwise comparison of all symbol nodes. Will not scale to large codebases.

findings.file: imports.py:21, calls.py:22, heritage.py, exports.py:14, community.py:47, coupling.py:40
findings.description: 6 phase files directly call storage._require_conn() to run raw Cypher. Breaks encapsulation.
All 6 workflow functions access g._storage directly. Private attribute access across module boundary.
Module-level 'from storage import GraphStorage' triggers kuzu import for the entire package. Pure-Python components (model, walker, parser_base) unnecessarily coupled to C extension.
_row_to_node() uses fragile 15-element positional destructuring. Schema changes will silently corrupt data.
String interpolation in Cypher IN clauses. All current callers pass controlled enum constants. Low risk.
_semantic_search() is O(n) linear scan over all embeddings. No ANN index.
add_nodes() executes one MERGE+SET per node. No batch optimization.
